sqlMap.select: /*DialogDgrcompoModify.selectDgrcompoRegiUpDgrcompoInfo*/ SELECT A.PRE_AMT AS UP_PRE_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #upTeBgtCompoId#

/*DialogDgrcompoModify.selectDgrcompoRegiInfo*/ SELECT 'L' || TO_CHAR(NVL(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(MAX(A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID), 2)), 0) + 1, '0000000000') AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , NVL(MAX(A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ), 9000000000) + 1 AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , (SELECT Z.TE_MNG_MOK_NM FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOK Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND Z.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = #teMngMokCd# ) AS TE_MNG_MOK_NM , (SELECT NVL(MAX(Z.SORT_SEQ) , (SELECT NVL(MAX(ZZ.SORT_SEQ), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO ZZ WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND ZZ.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND ZZ.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #upTeBgtCompoId# ) ) + POW(10, (4-#compoLevel#)) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND Z.DBIZ_CD = #dbizCd#
AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = DECODE(#upTeBgtCompoId#, '00000000000', Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID, #upTeBgtCompoId#) ) AS SORT_SEQ FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID LIKE 'L%'

/*DialogDgrcompoRegi.selectDgrcompofrscList*/ SELECT #fisYear# AS FIS_YEAR , #bgtDgr# AS BGT_DGR , #teBgtCompoId# AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.FRSC_FG_CD AS FRSC_FG_CD , A.FRSC_FG_NM AS FRSC_FG_NM , A.STAND_FRSC_CD AS STAND_FRSC_CD , 0 AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , 0 AS ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , 0 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , 0 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT FROM TB_YEARFRSC A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# ORDER BY A.FRSC_FG_CD

/*DialogDgrcompoRegi.selectDgrcompocharList*/ SELECT #fisYear# AS FIS_YEAR , #bgtDgr# AS BGT_DGR , #teBgtCompoId# AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.DETL_CD AS CHAR_FG_CD , A.DETL_CD_NM AS CHAR_FG_NM , 0 AS DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , 0 AS ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , 0 AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , 0 AS PRE_CHAR_AMT FROM TB_COMMCDDETL A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CL_CD = 'DC001' ORDER BY A.DETL_CD
sqlMap.insert: /*DialogDgrcompoRegi.insertDgrcompo*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPO( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_NM , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_SORT_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL , DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , DEMAND_BGT_AMT , DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , DEMAND_FORM_DSP_YN , COMPO_SORT_SEQ , COMPO_LEVEL , COMP_GROUND , COMP_FORMULAR , BGT_AMT , PRE_FORMULAR , PRE_AMT , DIFF_AMT , COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , FORM_DSP_YN , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , SORT_SEQ , PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , PRE_BGT_AMT , CNG_TYPE , GRP_ID , GRP_LVL , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES (#fisYear# , #bgtDgr# , #teBgtCompoId# , #deptCd# , #dbizCd# , #teMngMokCd# , #teMngMokNm# , #teBgtCompoSeq# , #sortSeq# , #compoLevel# , #demandCompGround# , #demandCompFormular# , (SELECT NVL(#demandBgtAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS DEMAND_BGT_AMT) , (SELECT NVL(#demandDiffAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT) , 0 , 'Y' , #sortSeq# , #compoLevel# , #compGround# , #compFormular# , (SELECT NVL(#bgtAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS BGT_AMT) , #preFormular# , (SELECT NVL(#preAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS PRE_AMT) , (SELECT NVL(#diffAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS DIFF_AMT) , 0 , 'Y' , NVL(#upTeBgtCompoSeq#, 0) , DECODE(#upTeBgtCompoId#, NULL, '00000000000', '', '00000000000', #upTeBgtCompoId#) , #sortSeq# , #preCompFormular# , (SELECT NVL(#preBgtAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS PRE_BGT_AMT) , #cngType# , #grpId# , #grpLvl# , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)

/*DialogDgrcompoRegi.insertDgrcompofrsc*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , FRSC_FG_CD , DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_FRSC_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES (#fisYear# , #bgtDgr# , #teBgtCompoId# , #frscFgCd# , #dmnDefFrscAmt# * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , #adjDefFrscAmt# * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , #preDefFrscAmt# * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , #preFrscAmt# * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , #teBgtCompoSeq# , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)

/*DialogDgrcompoRegi.insertDgrcompochar*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , CHAR_FG_CD , DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_CHAR_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES (#fisYear# , #bgtDgr# , #teBgtCompoId# , #charFgCd# , NVL(#dmnDefCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , NVL(#adjDefCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , NVL(#preDefCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , NVL(#preCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , #teBgtCompoSeq# , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)
